form.formComment: Second-up today. Fresh up after three months raced on the pace prior to fading finished fifth in a small field at Newcastle on March 14 over 3300m, 8 len behind Forcetoreckonwith with 74kg at $9. Previously second-up finished fifth of 7 starters at Kempton Park in the G2 Desert Orchid Chase on December 27 over 3200m, 56 len behind Thistle Ask with 66kg at $151. Leading contender and can find winning form.

form.formComment: Resuming today after four months. Finished off last preparation 4 of 14 starters at Catterick December 28 over 5000m, 5 len behind Valence D'aumont carrying 72.5kg at $6. Previously first up; 2 in a small field at Ludlow October 8 over 4000m, 9 len behind Gris Majeur with 71kg at $3.50. Can return in winning form.

form.formComment: Last run pulled up at Hereford on March 18 over 3200m. Run before finished third in a small field at Ludlow on February 26 over 3200m, 23 len behind Thank You Blue carrying 69kg at $13. Hard to recommend this time.

form.formComment: Last start finished 11th of 13 runners at Taunton on March 24 over 3300m, 56 len behind Victory Shout carrying 68.5kg at $15. Before that finished eighth of 12 starters at this track on March 5 over 3000m, 14 len behind Thankyouandplease carrying 71.5kg at $19. Likely to find this too tough without big improvement.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth of 8 starters at Hereford on March 18 over 3200m, 13 len behind The Brickey Ranger with 67.5kg at $7.50. form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up finished fourth of 9 runners at this track on February 25 over 4000m, 11 len behind Universal Secret carrying 66.5kg at $15. Second-up finished fifth of 7 starters at this track on April 1 over 4000m, 10 len behind Move With The Beat carrying 64.5kg at $15. Could pose a challenge on best form.
